ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "month_nb" INTEGER /* Month number of the recorded data (0-11) */,
  "temperature_c_avg" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temperature_c_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "temperature_c_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation_cm" REAL /* Precipitation in centimeters */,
  "soil_moisture_level" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "grain_deer_count" INTEGER /* Number of grain deer observed */,
  "grain_height_cm" REAL /* Height of grain in centimeters */,
  "infectious_level_percent" REAL /* Infectious level percentage impacting the crops */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_category" TEXT /* Category of the crop (e.g., grain, vegetable, fruit) */,
  "growth_cycle_days" INTEGER /* Growth cycle duration in days */,
  "water_requirement" REAL /* Water requirement of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the farmer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farmer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farmer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the farmer operates */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or position of the farmer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farmers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_monitoring" (
  "monitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being monitored */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition record */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer managing the crop */,
  "monitor_date" TEXT /* Date of monitoring */,
  "crop_health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the crop (e.g., healthy, diseased, pest-infested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_monitoring_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_monitoring_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_monitoring_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)
column_names: Month number of the recorded data (0-11)
Infectious level percentage impacting the crops
Category of the crop (e.g., grain, vegetable, fruit)
ID of the location where the farmer operates
Role or position of the farmer
Unique identifier for each monitoring record
ID of the crop being monitored
ID of the environmental condition record
ID of the farmer managing the crop
Health status of the crop (e.g., healthy, diseased, pest-infested)
